subject: [PATCH v4 08/21] zswap: prepare zswap for swap virtualization

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: The patch series is a good start, but some concerns were raised about the zswap tree code and its interaction with swap virtualization. The author needs to address these issues before proceeding.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch series updates the zswap code to prepare it for swap virtualization, replacing the existing range partition logic with a unified zswap tree.
